# Work Plan: April 6–10, 2026

## Overview

Weekly work plan for the week of April 6–10, 2026 (Week 15).

---

## Monday, April 6, 2026

| Time | Task | Owner | Priority |
|------|------|-------|----------|
| 09:00-10:00 | Weekly team standup | Alex Zhang | P1 |
| 10:00-12:00 | Q2 kickoff meeting with stakeholders | Alex Zhang | P1 |
| 13:00-15:00 | Review microservices architecture design | Platform Lead | P1 |
| 15:00-17:00 | Sprint planning session | Scrum Master | P1 |
| 17:00-18:00 | Email and administrative tasks | Alex Zhang | P2 |

---

## Tuesday, April 7, 2026

| Time | Task | Owner | Priority |
|------|------|-------|----------|
| 09:00-10:30 | 1:1 with Sarah Chen (Backend) | Alex Zhang | P1 |
| 10:30-12:00 | Code review for Project Alpha | Senior Engineers | P1 |
| 13:00-15:00 | Analytics v2 requirements review | Product Team | P1 |
| 15:00-16:30 | Security audit preparation | Security Team | P1 |
| 16:30-18:00 | Documentation review | Tech Writers | P2 |

**Milestone:** Q2 Planning Complete

---

## Wednesday, April 8, 2026

| Time | Task | Owner | Priority |
|------|------|-------|----------|
| 09:00-10:00 | Daily standup | Team Leads | P1 |
| 10:00-12:00 | Microservices migration planning workshop | Platform Team | P1 |
| 13:00-14:30 | Vendor meeting (cloud infrastructure) | DevOps Lead | P1 |
| 14:30-16:00 | Performance metrics review | Data Team | P2 |
| 16:00-18:00 | Team training: Kubernetes best practices | External Trainer | P2 |

---

## Thursday, April 9, 2026

| Time | Task | Owner | Priority |
|------|------|-------|----------|
| 09:00-10:30 | 1:1 with Mike Johnson (DevOps) | Alex Zhang | P1 |
| 10:30-12:00 | Project Beta kickoff meeting | Data Engineering | P1 |
| 13:00-15:00 | Cross-team sync: Platform & Data | Team Leads | P1 |
| 15:00-16:30 | Budget review for Q2 | Finance + Tech Leads | P2 |
| 16:30-18:00 | Technical debt assessment | Senior Engineers | P2 |

---

## Friday, April 10, 2026

| Time | Task | Owner | Priority |
|------|------|-------|----------|
| 09:00-10:00 | Weekly wrap-up standup | All Teams | P1 |
| 10:00-12:00 | Sprint retrospective | Scrum Master | P1 |
| 13:00-15:00 | Demo: Analytics v2 prototype | Data Team | P1 |
| 15:00-16:30 | Week 15 summary report preparation | Alex Zhang | P2 |
| 16:30-18:00 | Team social hour (optional) | All | P3 |

---

## Summary

| Day | Key Focus |
|-----|-----------|
| Monday | Q2 Kickoff & Sprint Planning |
| Tuesday | Reviews & Milestone (Q2 Planning Complete) |
| Wednesday | Migration Planning & Training |
| Thursday | Project Beta Kickoff |
| Friday | Demos & Retrospective |

---

## Key Milestones This Week

- ✅ **Apr 7:** Q2 Planning Complete
- 🎯 **Apr 10:** Week 15 deliverables finalized

---

*Document prepared on 2026-04-03T10:15:00+08:00 by Alex Zhang*
